en.description: Namecheap is an ICANN-accredited domain name registrar and technology company. Beyond domains, it provides a variety of hosting services that are widely considered some of the most budget-friendly in the market today.

services.title: Stellar Shared Hosting
services.info: Highly affordable plans including domain name registration and free CDN.

services.title: EasyWP
services.info: A fast and simplified managed WordPress hosting solution for everyone.

sections.title: Free Website Builder
sections.info: Includes an intuitive drag-and-drop tool to launch professional sites without coding.

sections.title: Supersonic Support
sections.info: Renowned for their 24/7 live chat support with extremely fast response times.

es.description: Namecheap es un registrador de dominios acreditado por ICANN y empresa tecnológica. Proporciona una variedad de servicios de hosting considerados de los más económicos del mercado.

services.title: Hosting Stellar
services.info: Planes muy asequibles que incluyen registro de dominio y CDN gratuito.

services.title: EasyWP
services.info: Una solución de hosting WordPress gestionado rápido y simplificado para todos.

sections.title: Creador de sitios gratuito
sections.info: Incluye una herramienta intuitiva de arrastrar y soltar para lanzar sitios profesionales.

sections.title: Soporte Supersónico
sections.info: Conocido por su chat en vivo 24/7 con tiempos de respuesta extremadamente rápidos.
